items.title: OpenAI Research | OpenAI
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been actively publishing research across multiple fronts in early 2026. Notable March 2026 papers include work on chain-of-thought monitorability (studying misalignment in internal coding agents), improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs via the 'IH-Challenge' framework for safety steerability and resistance to prompt injection, and a theoretical physics preprint extending single-minus amplitudes to gravitons with GPT-5.2 Pro assistance. items.title: Sora isn't the only thing OpenAI shut down this month - 9to5Mac
items.author: 9to5mac.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been active with several major announcements in late March 2026. On the product side, OpenAI rolled out GPT-5.4 mini to ChatGPT Free and Go users via the 'Thinking' feature, with GPT-5 Thinking mini slated for retirement within 30 days. Shopping in ChatGPT received a major upgrade with visual product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and a Walmart in-ChatGPT integration powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol.
